name: swarmx
description: SwarmX — AI Agent Teams with x402 Micropayments. Multi-agent crypto analysis, code audit, research, content, DeFi, trading, and more.

tools.name: swarmx_contract_audit
tools.description: Multi-agent smart contract pre-audit. 4 AI agents analyze security vulnerabilities, economic risks, copy/clone detection, and gas optimization. Returns structured risk report with EXCELLENT/GOOD/NEEDS_WORK/POOR verdict. $0.10/call via x402.

code.description: Smart contract source code to audit

language.description: Contract language. Defaults to 'solidity' if not specified.

tools.name: swarmx_contract_audit_quick
tools.description: Single-agent quick security scan for smart contracts. Fast and cheap, covers major security vulnerabilities only. $0.03/call via x402.

code.description: Smart contract source code to scan

tools.name: swarmx_contract_audit_deep
tools.description: Comprehensive 6-agent deep smart contract audit. Security, economic, gas, copy/clone detection, plus additional verification pass. $0.25/call via x402.

code.description: Smart contract source code for deep audit

tools.name: swarmx_token_risk
tools.description: Multi-agent token risk assessment. 3 agents score a token for rug pull indicators, timeline anomalies, copy/clone detection, and tokenomics issues. Returns SAFE/CAUTION/DANGER verdict. $0.05/call via x402.

tools.name: swarmx_dao_analyze
tools.description: Multi-agent DAO proposal analysis. 4 agents assess economic impact, technical feasibility, risk, and produce FOR/AGAINST/ABSTAIN recommendation with confidence. $0.10/call via x402.

proposal.description: The DAO proposal text to analyze

tools.name: swarmx_memecoin_score
tools.description: Multi-agent memecoin risk scoring. 3 agents check contract authorities, holder concentration, and produce SAFE/CAUTION/DANGER/SCAM verdict. $0.05/call via x402.

tools.name: swarmx_wallet_risk_score
tools.description: Multi-agent wallet risk assessment. 2 agents analyze transaction patterns and produce a risk level (low/moderate/elevated/high/critical). $0.05/call via x402.

tools.name: swarmx_tx_explainer
tools.description: Explain any Solana transaction in plain English. Returns type classification, participants, tokens involved, and summary. $0.03/call via x402.

tools.name: swarmx_summarize
tools.description: AI-powered text summarization. Produces a clear, concise summary of any content. $0.01/call via x402.

maxLength.description: Maximum summary length in words. Defaults to 200.

tools.name: swarmx_translate
tools.description: AI translation to any language. Auto-detects source language. $0.02/call via x402.

tools.name: swarmx_extract
tools.description: Structured data extraction from unstructured text. Pull specific fields using AI. $0.01/call via x402.

text.description: The unstructured text to extract data from

fields.description: Array of field names to extract (e.g. ['name', 'email', 'company'])

tools.name: swarmx_sentiment
tools.description: AI sentiment analysis. Returns positive/negative/neutral classification with confidence score (0-1) and reasoning. $0.01/call via x402.

text.description: The text to analyze sentiment for

tools.name: swarmx_write
tools.description: Multi-agent content writing. Research, fact-check, and write on any topic. 3 agents collaborate. $0.03/call via x402.

tools.name: swarmx_seo_article
tools.description: Multi-agent SEO article generation. 3 agents (SEOResearcher, ContentWriter, Editor) produce a keyword-optimized article with meta description and readability score. $0.25/call via x402.

tools.name: swarmx_document_extract
tools.description: AI document data extraction. Pull structured fields from unstructured text with confidence scoring. Supports auto-detect or specific field extraction. $0.05/call via x402.

text.description: The document text to extract data from (max 100,000 chars)

fields.description: Specific fields to extract. Omit for auto-detection (max 50 fields).

tools.name: swarmx_code_review
tools.description: Multi-agent code review. SecurityAuditor, PerformanceReviewer, and StyleChecker agents analyze code in parallel. $0.03/call via x402.

language.description: Programming language hint (e.g. 'TypeScript', 'Solidity'). Auto-detected if omitted.

tools.name: swarmx_code_audit
tools.description: Multi-agent code audit for ANY programming language. 3 agents (SecurityReviewer, PerformanceAnalyst, BestPracticesChecker) run concurrently. Returns scored findings and EXCELLENT/GOOD/NEEDS_WORK/POOR verdict. $0.10/call via x402.

language.description: Programming language. Auto-detected from code if omitted.

tools.name: swarmx_research
tools.description: Multi-agent research pipeline. Researcher, FactChecker, and Writer produce a verified report on any topic. $0.05/call via x402.

tools.name: swarmx_analyze
tools.description: Multi-perspective analysis panel. Technical, Economic, and Risk experts synthesize an assessment. $0.03/call via x402.

text.description: The text or topic to analyze

tools.name: swarmx_agent
tools.description: Single AI agent execution. Run a custom task with configurable model and system prompt. $0.02/call via x402.

task.description: The task for the agent to complete

systemPrompt.description: Custom system prompt for the agent

tools.name: swarmx_research_report
tools.description: 4-agent fact-checked research report. Researcher, FactChecker (VERIFIED/UNVERIFIED/DISPUTED/OUTDATED/FABRICATED), Analyst, and Writer produce a rigorous report. $0.50/call via x402.

focus.description: Optional focus area to narrow the research scope

tools.name: swarmx_debate
tools.description: Multi-agent debate. Proponent, Opponent, and Judge agents argue a proposition and deliver a verdict with confidence. $0.03/call via x402.

proposition.description: The statement or question to debate

tools.name: swarmx_yield_optimizer
tools.description: 3-agent DeFi yield optimizer. Scans DeFiLlama yields, evaluates protocol risk, recommends allocation strategy. $0.10/call via x402.

amount.description: Investment amount in USD. Optional — strategy works without it.

tools.name: swarmx_wallet_analyzer
tools.description: Solana wallet analyzer. Returns SOL balance, token holdings with USD values, NFTs, and recent transactions. $0.01/call via x402.

tools.name: swarmx_wallet_report
tools.description: Full Solana wallet report bundle. SOL balance, token holdings, top-token holder concentration, and DeFi positions in one call. $0.03/call via x402.

tools.name: swarmx_defi_positions
tools.description: Scan a Solana wallet for DeFi positions. Detects Marinade, Jito, Raydium LP tokens and more. $0.02/call via x402.

tools.name: swarmx_token_holders
tools.description: Get top holders for any SPL token. Returns amounts, percentages, and concentration analysis. $0.01/call via x402.

limit.description: Number of top holders to return (1-20). Defaults to 20.

tools.name: swarmx_tx_history
tools.description: Get recent transaction history for any Solana address. Returns signatures, types, and timestamps. $0.01/call via x402.

limit.description: Number of transactions to return (1-10). Defaults to 10.

tools.name: swarmx_token_price
tools.description: Real-time token price in USD via Jupiter. Sub-second cached, designed for HFT bot loops. $0.001/call via x402.

tools.name: swarmx_token_supply
tools.description: Get total supply and decimals for any SPL token mint via Solana RPC. $0.001/call via x402.

tools.name: swarmx_slot_info
tools.description: Current Solana slot and block time. Network health monitoring for trading bots. $0.001/call via x402.

tools.name: swarmx_token_accounts
tools.description: List all SPL token accounts for a wallet. Portfolio monitoring with optional mint filter. $0.002/call via x402.

mint.description: Optional mint filter. Only return accounts for this specific token.

tools.name: swarmx_recent_blockhash
tools.description: Get latest blockhash for transaction building. Every bot needs this before submitting a tx. $0.001/call via x402.

tools.name: swarmx_compliance_check
tools.description: 3-agent compliance analysis. Auto-detects or targets GDPR/SOC2/HIPAA/MiCA/AML/PCI-DSS/CCPA. Returns gap analysis and remediation roadmap. $0.50/call via x402.

document.description: The document, policy, or system description to check for compliance (max 100,000 chars)

framework.description: Target compliance framework. Omit for auto-detection.

tools.name: swarmx_investment_dd
tools.description: 5-agent investment due diligence. Concurrent analysis of team, tokenomics, tech, community, and market. Returns STRONG_BUY/BUY/HOLD/AVOID/STRONG_AVOID recommendation. $5.00/call via x402.

context.description: Additional context (whitepaper excerpts, links, etc., max 5000 chars)

tools.name: swarmx_stock_dd
tools.description: Tokenized-stock due diligence. Fetches real market data (price, 6-month range, trend, volatility) then runs an adversarial 3-agent Swarm debate (bull / bear / risk) judged into a bullish/neutral/bearish verdict with confidence and supporting points. $0.29/call via x402.

ticker.description: Equity ticker to analyze: 1-6 uppercase letters A-Z (e.g. NVDA, AAPL, TSLA).

tools.name: swarmx_batch
tools.description: Run up to 10 tasks in parallel with a single x402 payment. 20% discount on the sum of individual prices. Each task specifies an endpoint slug and params.

tasks.description: Array of tasks. Each task: { "endpoint": "<slug>", "params": { ... } }. Valid slugs: summarize, translate, extract, sentiment, code-review, write, debate, contract-audit, token-risk, dao-analyze, research, analyze, agent.

tools.name: swarmx_catalog
tools.description: List all available SwarmX paid endpoints with pricing. Free, no payment required.

tools.name: swarmx_health
tools.description: SwarmX service health, revenue stats, and network info. Free, no payment required.

tools.name: swarmx_revenue
tools.description: Detailed revenue breakdown — totals, time-period stats, top buyers, conversion rate. Free, no payment required.
